_comment_top: R6 task 108 (D-H-08, FR-19) — seed row for the InvoiceExtractionToolHandler typed handler.
_comment_routing: Runtime invocation routes to the C# class via sprk_handlerclass = 'InvoiceExtractionToolHandler' (= nameof handler class).
_comment_consumption: Read by scripts/Seed-TypedHandlers.ps1. Idempotent — script queries by sprk_toolcode first; UPSERTs.
_comment_toolcode: sprk_toolcode column has 10-char max (per task 104 note). 'INVEXT@v1' = 9 chars; well under cap.
sprk_description: LLM-assisted invoice extraction with deterministic decimal line-item arithmetic. Extracts invoice header (number, dates, vendor, customer) and line items (description, quantity, unit price, tax rate, tax amount, line total) from invoice document text. Code-side decimal math verifies line totals, subtotal, tax total, discount total, and grand total per configured tax method (inclusive/exclusive) and discount order (pre-tax/post-tax). Arithmetic mismatches surface in arithmeticErrors[] (NOT auto-corrected — FR-19 binding).
_comment_availableincontexts: 100000002 = Both (Playbook + Chat). FR-19 acceptance: invocable from both playbook orchestration (AP automation, vendor reviews) and chat-driven function calling (ad-hoc invoice analysis).

sprk_jsonschema.title: InvoiceExtractionToolHandler Request
sprk_jsonschema.description: Argument shape for chat-driven invocation of InvoiceExtractionToolHandler. The 'text' field carries the invoice document body to extract from.

text.description: Invoice document text body. Plain text extracted from PDF / DOCX upstream by the document pipeline. The LLM extracts header + line items; deterministic code computes totals.

extractLineItems.description: When false, extract header only; skip line-item extraction (faster, header-only summaries).

validateArithmetic.description: When false, suppress arithmeticErrors[] in the output (still computes totals).

currency.description: ISO-4217 currency code hint when the invoice text is ambiguous (e.g., bare '$' in a multi-currency tenant).

sprk_configuration._comment: Default configuration. Per-invocation playbook config may override taxMethod / discountOrder / roundingMode / decimalPrecision / expectedCurrencies / modelDeployment / extractLineItems / validateArithmetic per row.

_comment_configuration_keys: taxMethod: 'exclusive' (default; tax computed on subtotal, added on top) or 'inclusive' (line totals include tax; subtotal back-derived).
discountOrder: 'pre-tax' (default; discount reduces subtotal before tax) or 'post-tax' (discount applied to grandTotal after tax).
decimalPrecision: 0-8; default 2 (USD/EUR/GBP/CAD); set 0 for JPY-style zero-fraction currencies.
expectedCurrencies: ISO-4217 codes the handler will accept; LLM output with currency outside this list returns VALIDATION_FAILED.
modelDeployment: optional Azure OpenAI deployment override; defaults to ModelSelectorOptions.ToolHandlerModel (gpt-4o-mini).
extractLineItems: when false, skip line-item extraction (header-only).
validateArithmetic: when false, omit arithmeticErrors[] from output (still computes totals).
